Index.title: K-Agency
Index.hero_desc: Premium recruitment agency. We value the Kingdom's large-scale infrastructure and connect global companies with exceptional profiles (Finance, IT, Logistics, Engineering) between Africa and Europe.

challenges.title_2: It is a bet on the human.
challenges.p1: International recruitment has become complex. Today, companies face major challenges that threaten their growth and organizational stability.
challenges.p2: As an international recruitment agency operating between Morocco and Europe, we have understood that "selling human" is not only ineffective but risky. It is not about placing resources, but creating sustainable synergies between demanding talents and ambitious companies.
challenges.box_desc: Talents sourced without borders, from Morocco to Europe and vice versa.
challenges.c1_desc: A hiring mistake costs on average 30,000 to 50,000 euros. We secure your recruitments through an in-depth behavioral assessment (soft-skills) to guarantee long-term commitment.
challenges.c2_desc: More than 60% of CVs contain exaggerations. Our process includes a systematic and rigorous verification of diplomas, experiences, and a 360° reference check.
challenges.c3_desc: The best talents (C-Level, tech profiles, sharp experts) no longer respond to classic advertisements. We use our international network and our direct approach to hunt them down where they excel.

process.desc: A tailor-made, rigorous, and confidential process, guaranteeing the perfect match between your ambitions and the identified talent.
process.step1_desc: Total immersion in your corporate culture. Together we define the ideal profile, key skills, and the targeted sourcing strategy (Morocco, Europe, Africa).
process.step2_desc: Direct approach of the best talents. We activate our exclusive network and our executive search tools to identify rare and passive profiles.
process.step3_desc: In-depth interviews, personality tests, and reference checks. We only present a shortlist of perfectly aligned candidates.
process.step4_desc: Support during negotiations and rigorous follow-up throughout the trial period to guarantee a sustainable and successful recruitment.

Footer.desc: Premium recruitment and executive search agency in Morocco and internationally. Human excellence at the service of performance.

Recrutement.title: Talents to shape tomorrow
Recrutement.intro: At K-Agency, we don't just recruit CVs, we recruit personalities, ambitions, and stories. Our mission is to create sustainable and fulfilling professional encounters, based on trust and transparency.
Recrutement.philo_title: The Human at the Center of Our Approach
Recrutement.philo_p1: In a constantly changing professional world, the true added value of a company lies in its employees. We deeply believe that the success of a recruitment is not measured solely by technical fit, but above all by cultural and human fit.
Recrutement.philo_p2: Our consultants, experts in their respective sectors, take the time to understand the DNA of your company: your values, your vision, and the work environment you offer.
Recrutement.philo_p3: On the candidate side, we act as true career coaches. We listen to their aspirations, evaluate their soft skills with care, and orient them towards opportunities where they can thrive and give their best.
Recrutement.approach_subtitle: A proven method that combines analytical rigor and emotional intelligence.
Recrutement.approach_1_desc: Immersion in your offices, interviews with operational managers to capture the essence of the need. We co-write the ideal profile integrating your strategic challenges.
Recrutement.approach_2_desc: Targeted hunting, activation of our exclusive pool, and multi-channel dissemination. We contact potential candidates with personalized and encouraging messages.
Recrutement.approach_3_desc: Beyond technical skills, we assess personality, leadership potential, and adaptability through in-depth interviews and recognized psychometric tests.

ChasseDeTetes.title: Executive Search
ChasseDeTetes.subtitle: Tracking down executives and rare profiles
ChasseDeTetes.intro: Executive Search is our core business. We identify highly qualified executives and experts who are not actively seeking opportunities, in Morocco and internationally, in the strictest confidentiality. Our goal: to find the leader who will transform your organization.
ChasseDeTetes.partnership_p1: Recruiting an executive (C-Level, Director, Expert) cannot be improvised. It is a delicate process that requires tact, a solid network, and the ability to establish a dialogue of equals.
ChasseDeTetes.partnership_p2: Our associates approach each search mission with the highest standards. We meet our candidates in professional and pleasant settings, far from the stress of classic interviews, to understand their real career drivers.
ChasseDeTetes.partnership_item2: Assessment of leadership and emotional intelligence
ChasseDeTetes.reverse_p1: You are a high-level executive (CEO, GM, Member of the Executive Committee) and want to give a new momentum to your career, but your status prohibits any visible steps on the market.
ChasseDeTetes.reverse_p2: K-Agency acts as your exclusive career agent. We organize a tailor-made "reverse hunt". We target and approach directly, in our name, shareholders, investment funds, or boards of directors of companies that match your ambitions.
ChasseDeTetes.reverse_quote: "A highly confidential process where your identity is only revealed at the very last moment, during a secure meeting at the highest decision-making level."
ChasseDeTetes.reverse_meth1_desc: Definition of a restricted list of target companies in line with your values and salary requirements.
ChasseDeTetes.reverse_meth2_desc: We contact Presidents and Board Members directly (without going through HR) to create the need.
ChasseDeTetes.reverse_meth3_desc: Securing conditions (C-Level Package, exit clauses, governance) before revealing your identity.
ChasseDeTetes.methodology_subtitle: A structured and discreet approach to guarantee exceptional results.
ChasseDeTetes.meth1_desc: We map your competitive market exhaustively to identify hidden talents. A data-driven analysis combined with our human network.
ChasseDeTetes.meth2_desc: Our approach messages are finely crafted, personalized, and respectful. We know how to spark the interest of highly sought-after passive profiles.
ChasseDeTetes.meth3_desc: We scrupulously protect the anonymity of our clients (replacement project, merger) and our candidates until the appropriate time.
ChasseDeTetes.meth4_desc: We play the role of facilitator during salary and equity negotiations (Package, equity, benefits) to ensure a win-win agreement.

DeposerCV.title: Submit a Spontaneous Application
DeposerCV.subtitle: Join our exclusive talent pool
DeposerCV.intro: Are you open to new opportunities? Submit your profile. Our consultants will analyze your background with the utmost discretion and contact you if an opportunity matches your ambitions.
DeposerCV.success: Your application has been submitted successfully. Our team will review it quickly.
DeposerCV.form_cv_click: Click here to select your CV

Blog.subtitle: Job market trends, sectoral analyses, and exclusive advice for executives and HR professionals.
Blog.podcast_desc: Every month, we invite an inspiring executive (Morocco or Africa) to decipher their journey, their vision of management, and the challenges of their sector.
Blog.art_1_title: Tech Recruitment in Morocco: Indicator of Digital Maturity
Blog.art_1_excerpt: IT recruitment does not fail because of the market, but because of organizational fuzziness. How are companies in Casablanca and Rabat adapting their governance to attract top profiles?
Blog.art_2_title: Executive Retention in Morocco: Why You Lose Your Best Talent (and How to Fix It)
Blog.art_2_excerpt: Faced with increased international competition in Casablanca Finance City, retaining C-Level leaders is a major challenge. Decrypting real retention drivers in Morocco.
Blog.art_3_title: Executive Recruitment in Morocco: Behavioral Assessment Faced with AI-Polished CVs
Blog.art_3_excerpt: From Marrakech to Tangier, AI generates paper-perfect applications. How to secure executive recruitment using reference checks and soft skills?
Blog.art_4_title: Purchasing Recruitment Briefs: How Moroccan Corporate Culture Redefines Priorities
Blog.art_4_excerpt: The job brief is not a simple list of tasks. Discover how to align stakeholders and recruiters to find the ideal Purchasing profile in Morocco.
Blog.art_5_title: FMCG Regional Director in Morocco: Driving Commercial Performance in Changing Times
Blog.art_5_excerpt: From Casablanca to Agadir, the FMCG market in Morocco is changing rapidly. What are the management challenges for the modern FMCG Director?
Blog.art_6_title: Salary Guide: Wealth Management and Family Office in Casablanca Finance City 2026
Blog.art_6_excerpt: Exclusive analysis of compensation, bonuses, and benefits for wealth managers and family offices operating in Morocco and North Africa.
Blog.art_7_title: Social Development in Morocco: Supporting Communities for Sustainable Impact
Blog.art_7_excerpt: How K-Agency recruits community development and CSR experts to structure high-impact social initiatives in Moroccan regions.
Blog.art_8_title: Restructuring and Carve-outs in Morocco: Why the Transition Manager is Essential
Blog.art_8_excerpt: Mergers, acquisitions, social restructuring: discover how transition management secures critical periods of business transformation in Morocco.
Blog.art_9_title: Compensation Strategy in Morocco: Staying Competitive Against International Attraction
Blog.art_9_excerpt: Moroccan companies must face the brain drain. Analysis of innovative compensation packages to retain key talent.
Blog.art_10_title: HR Transformation 2026: Why Rethinking Your Human Resources Organization in Morocco
Blog.art_10_excerpt: The rise of hybrid work and digitalization imposes new HR models. Decrypting the reorganization needed to support growth.
Blog.art_11_title: Wage Portability (Portage Salarial) in Morocco: A Future Model for Freelancing and Consulting
Blog.art_11_excerpt: Flexibility and security combined. Analysis of the rise of wage portability to attract independent experts and high-end consultants to Morocco.

Implantations.subtitle: The job market in Morocco is diverse. The challenges of Casablanca are not those of Tangier or Marrakech. At K-Agency, we master the socio-economic ecosystem of each city to offer you the most relevant talents.
Implantations.cta_title: A recruitment planned in the region?
Implantations.cta_desc: Whether it's for the opening of a new industrial site in Tangier Med or the recruitment of hotel management in Marrakech, our local teams are ready to support you.

casablanca.subtitle: The Economic Capital
casablanca.desc: The beating heart of the Moroccan economy, Casablanca hosts the headquarters of multinationals. We recruit high-level profiles to drive continental growth.

tanger.subtitle: The Industrial & Logistics Hub
tanger.desc: Gateway to Europe and global logistics hub with Tangier Med. Our expertise covers the entire industrial value chain, from engineering to plant management.

marrakech.subtitle: Service Excellence
marrakech.desc: Capital of luxury tourism and international events. We support palaces and major service actors in acquiring exceptional talents.

fes-meknes.subtitle: Agro-industry & Offshoring
fes-meknes.desc: Historical region undergoing major agricultural and technological transition. A vast talent pool for agribusiness and shared service centers.

rabat.subtitle: Technologies & Institutions
rabat.desc: Administrative capital and new technological center of excellence (Technopolis). We recruit for institutions, NGOs, and the tech sector.

agadir.subtitle: Seaside & Fishery Hub
agadir.desc: The pearl of the Moroccan south is experiencing a major economic boom. Between seaside tourism, modern agriculture, and the fishing industry, our experts identify the best talents to support this regional dynamic.

ExpertisesIndex.title: Expertises Index
ExpertisesIndex.subtitle: Find here all our areas of expertise by city, sector, and profession. Our deep knowledge of local ecosystems allows us to support you throughout the Moroccan territory.

SeoEngine.hero_desc: To support local dynamics, attracting the best C-Levels is crucial. But how can you be sure of their real competence?
SeoEngine.problem_title1: Recruitment in the era of Artificial Intelligence:
SeoEngine.problem_p1: Today, recruiting this profile has become a real challenge. Why? Because generative Artificial Intelligence has disrupted the rules of applications.
SeoEngine.problem_alert_title: The Disadvantage of classic digital processes
SeoEngine.problem_alert_desc: Perfect CVs generated in 5 seconds, cover letters polished by ChatGPT, and even AI assistants capable of passing online cognitive tests instead of the candidate. The "perfect on paper" profiles have become indistinguishable from true leaders.
SeoEngine.problem_p2: You cannot entrust the future of your company to a keyword matching algorithm.
SeoEngine.sol1_desc: Our assessment is not based on a CV, but on an in-depth meeting. We test leadership, stress management, and cultural "fit".
SeoEngine.sol2_desc: AI cannot simulate field experience. We challenge candidates on complex Business Cases related to the market.
SeoEngine.sol3_desc: An in-depth reputation check with former N+1 and N-1, impossible for a candidate to falsify.
SeoEngine.cta_title: Entrust us with the search for your expert in
SeoEngine.cta_desc: We have the network and the methodology to approach the most performing passive profiles in the field:
